race.comment: DUBAI WARRIOR (1) is building a good winning CV and has excellent second-up stats. Excellent return from the long layoff with a tenacious third over this trip at Gosford in the heavy (8) going. Claim helps again and has excellent prospects. SQUEEZEBOX (3) consistent gelding with a fitness edge over the bulk of these. On the quick back-up from the good draw and stays in the calculations. LET'S FLY (2) frustrating mare who drops sharply in grade with the 3kg claim. Sat on the speed and not that far away on the line when ninth over 1800m Randwick in F&M BM78 class. Back in trip and looks the value play in the race. SATONO JASMINE (7) got the job done in grand style at start five when she came from back in the field for a dominant 4 len win over this trip at Gosford. Drawn out again and sure to be thereabouts.
